claim: Verification confirms gathered evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness. Explorer and cross-checker results are consistent, evidence paths/sources are usable, no assumptions are presented as facts, and missing data is properly empty.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt enforces scope declaration: every evidence record must include scope field; project facts require project-scoped evidence with repo-relative paths; external research tools must be marked scope=external.
evidence.why: Core protocol contract that defines scope separation requirements at the point of evidence generation.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues function generates blockers when project-scoped evidence lacks repo-relative path or when existing-project facts only have external/user/unknown evidence.
evidence.why: Enforcement mechanism that blocks PRD readiness when project facts lack proper project-scoped evidence with concrete locators.

evidence.summary: Doctrine explicitly states external evidence from WebFetch/WebSearch can only be background research, not proof of existing project fields/APIs/states.
evidence.why: Product specification confirming the intent and boundaries of external vs project evidence.

evidence.summary: Runtime boundary audit builds snapshot before/after agent runs, detects any project file mutations outside allowed artifact root, and generates boundary blockers if violations occur.
evidence.why: Shows the mechanism that ensures evidence agents cannot modify target project files during verification.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope function classifies evidence by declared scope, source type, URL patterns, and path existence to prevent external web evidence from being treated as project facts.
evidence.why: Scope classification logic that enforces separation between external research and project facts.

risks: Evidence agents may misclassify ambiguous evidence in edge cases despite documented rules.
Boundary audit may not catch all forms of project state mutations if they occur through indirect means.

result.notes: Verification confirms that explorer and cross-checker provided consistent, well-supported evidence with valid project-scoped paths and sources. No assumptions are presented as facts. All evidence records include required scope declarations. The system correctly enforces scope separation between external research and project facts. Missing arrays are empty, indicating no gaps in verification. PRD readiness blockers are resolved.
